summary: Handled a service restart request: inspected existing terminal sessions, cleaned up stale service processes, restarted frontend dev server, performed a clean backend restart, and confirmed both endpoints respond successfully.
current_status: Services are running and healthy. Backend is reachable at http://127.0.0.1:8000 (API 200) and frontend at http://127.0.0.1:5173 (HTTP 200).
